headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://*.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://*.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.cloudflare.com;
